storyBeat: 媽媽和孟子 — 第一個家在「人們想念家人的地方」旁

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first! Little Meng liked to watch the people walk past.
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講孟母三遷的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，學會了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在孟母三遷的故事裡：
🔑 mother = 媽媽
🔑 house = 家
🔑 move = 搬家
🔑 neighbor = 鄰居

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 market = 市場
🔑 cloth = 布
🔑 boy = 男孩
🔑 place = 地方

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a market?
questions.question: Which one is a market?
questions.explanationZh: market = 市場 🏪！孟子的媽媽帶他搬到市場旁邊——那裡很熱鬧。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows cloth?
questions.question: Which one shows cloth?
questions.explanationZh: cloth = 布 🧶！孟子的媽媽用布做東西，把家裡的東西也裝進布袋裡搬走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mother packed their things and moved to a new house.
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽收拾好東西，搬到新的家。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a boy sitting alone at a desk
a woman packing bags to move home
a girl buying fruit at a stall
an old man reading by a fire
optionsZh: 一個男孩獨自坐在書桌前
一位女士打包行李要搬家
一個女孩在攤位買水果
一位老公公在火旁讀書
questions.explanationZh: move = 搬家。句子說媽媽打包行李搬到新的家——圖中正好是女士在打包要搬家。

storyBeat: 玩埋葬遊戲 — 媽媽心很重

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在孟母三遷的故事裡：
🔑 learn = 學習
🔑 study = 讀書
🔑 school = 學校
🔑 good place = 好地方

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng wanted to learn and study near a school.
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子想在學校旁邊學習和讀書。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'study near a school'?
options: a boy reading books beside a school
a woman selling fruit at a stall
a girl playing with a cat outside
a man walking past a busy market
optionsZh: 一個男孩在學校旁邊讀書
一位女士在攤位賣水果
一個女孩在外面和貓玩
一個男人走過熱鬧的市場
questions.explanationZh: school = 學校，study = 讀書。句子說孟子想在學校附近學習——圖中是男孩在學校旁讀書。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows a school?
questions.question: Which one shows a school?
questions.explanationZh: school = 學校 🏫！孟子的媽媽最後搬到學校旁邊，讓孟子可以好好學習。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every year the mother ___ to a new house.
questions.sentenceEasy: The mother ___ to a new house.
questions.sentenceHard: When the place was not right, the mother ___ her family to a better home.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
故事發生在以前，所以要用過去式 moved（搬了）。
🔑 move → moved（過去式規則動詞，字尾加 -d）

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
複習一下今天學過的字：
🔑 school = 學校
🔑 move = 搬家
🔑 learn = 學習
🔑 market = 市場

storyBeat: 搬到市場 — 孟子看人們買賣

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 place = 地方
🔑 pack = 打包
🔑 move = 搬
🔑 market = 市場
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This is not the right place for my son to learn."
questions.explanationZh: 「這不是適合我兒子學習的地方。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She packed their things into two big cloth bags.
questions.question: What did the mother do first?
options: sat down to wait for help
questions.explanationZh: 「packed into bags」——把東西放進袋子,這是搬家的第一步!
questions.sentenceZh: 她把他們的東西裝進兩個大布袋。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They moved to a small house near a busy market.
questions.questionEn: Was the new place full of people and noise?
questions.explanationZh: 「busy market」——很忙很吵的市場,當然人多、很熱鬧。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們搬到一個小房子,就在熱鬧的市場旁邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng watched people buy and sell all day long.
questions.explanationZh: 孟子整天看人們買東西、賣東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Sellers held up fish, fruit, and bread for the people.
questions.question: What did the sellers in the market do?
questions.explanationZh: 「held up fish/fruit/bread」——舉起來讓人看,就是「把東西拿出來賣」呀!
questions.sentenceZh: 小販們舉著魚、水果和麵包給大家看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon Meng began to copy them in their yard.
questions.explanationZh: 不久後,孟子開始在他們的院子裡學他們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He held up sticks and called out, just like the sellers.
questions.question: What was Meng copying from the market?
options: the way sellers called out prices
how birds flew in the sky
the slow songs of the old men
questions.explanationZh: 「held up sticks + called out」——舉東西叫賣,就是在學「賣家叫賣的方式」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他舉著小樹枝,叫賣起來,就像那些攤販一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother heard him from inside the house.
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽在屋裡聽見他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is happening to Meng again?
questions.question: What is happening?
options: 🪞 he learns from what is near
🌙 he sleeps all day at home
🍎 he is hungry and wants food
questions.explanationZh: 他又學起身邊看到的事了——每換一個地方,他就學那裡的事。選「他學身邊看到的」!
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子又怎麼了?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She stopped her weaving. She thought hard...
questions.explanationZh: 她停下織布。她認真地想……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She packed their things into two big cloth bags.
questions.question: What containers did the mother use when moving?
questions.explanationZh: 「two big cloth bags」就是大布袋——選「large fabric sacks」!
questions.sentenceZh: 她把東西裝進兩個大布袋裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They moved to a small house near a busy market.
questions.questionEn: Was the new neighbourhood quiet and calm?
questions.explanationZh: 「busy market」——很忙碌的市場旁,當然不安靜!答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們搬到了一個小房子,就在熱鬧的市場旁邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 market = 市場
🔑 sell = 賣東西
🔑 call out = 叫賣
🔑 seller = 攤販
市場篇的關鍵字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng watched people buy and sell all day long.
questions.question: What does Meng spend his time doing near the market?
questions.explanationZh: 「watched people buy and sell all day long」——整天看著人們買賣!
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子整天看人們買東西、賣東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon Meng began to copy them in their yard.
questions.question: What is Meng doing again in the new place?
questions.explanationZh: 換了地方——還是「模仿身邊看到的事」!孟子的老習慣沒變。
questions.sentenceZh: 不久後,孟子又開始在院子裡模仿他們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She stopped her weaving. She thought hard.
questions.questionEn: Was the mother satisfied with what the market was teaching Meng?
questions.explanationZh: 她停下織布、認真思考——說明她又不滿意了!答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她停下織布,認真地想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sellers held up fish, fruit, and bread for the people.
questions.question: What kind of place is this new neighbourhood?
questions.explanationZh: 魚、水果、麵包、叫賣——這是個「忙碌的購物區」(市場)!
questions.sentenceZh: 攤販們舉著魚、水果和麵包給大家看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother heard him from inside the house.
questions.question: What will the mother most likely do after hearing Meng?
options: buy him a small market stand
ask Meng to shout even louder
praise him for his good memory
questions.explanationZh: 她每次不滿意就搬家——所以很可能「再考慮搬一次」!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽在屋裡聽見他。

storyBeat: 孟子叫賣 — 媽媽決定再搬一次

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 coin = 錢
🔑 shout = 喊
🔑 yard = 院子
🔑 hear = 聽見
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Two for one coin! Fresh today!" Meng shouted.
questions.explanationZh: 「兩個一塊!今天新鮮!」孟子大喊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He waved his small sticks like seller goods.
questions.question: What was Meng pretending to do?
questions.explanationZh: 「waved sticks like seller goods」——舉著樹枝叫賣,就是在「假裝賣東西給人」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他揮舞小樹枝,像在賣東西一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother put down her cloth right away.
questions.questionEn: Did the mother stop her work as soon as she heard him?
questions.explanationZh: 「put down right away」——立刻放下,一點都沒猶豫。答案是 Yes,她馬上停下來了!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽馬上把布放下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "He learns what he sees. He sees what is near."
questions.explanationZh: 「他學他看到的。他看到的,就是身邊的。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She understood that the place was teaching him.
questions.question: What did the mother understand?
questions.explanationZh: 「place was teaching him」——住的地方在默默影響他。答案是「住的地方在教你」!
questions.sentenceZh: 她明白了,是這個地方在教他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She knew it was time to move once more.
questions.explanationZh: 她知道,是時候再搬一次了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: This would be the third house they had lived in.
questions.question: How many houses will the family have lived in?
questions.explanationZh: 「third house」——第三個家!數一數:第一、第二、第三,所以是「三間」!
questions.sentenceZh: 這將是他們住過的第三個家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She started packing again with steady, calm hands.
questions.explanationZh: 她又開始打包,手又穩又安靜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How does the mother feel about moving again?
questions.question: How does she feel?
questions.explanationZh: 「手穩 + 確信時候到了」——她沒猶豫,就是「堅定確信」的媽媽力量!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽對再次搬家有什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But where could they go this time? She had one place in mind...
questions.explanationZh: 但這次能搬去哪?她心裡有一個地方……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Two for one coin! Fresh today!" Meng shouted.
questions.question: What role is young Meng playing?
questions.explanationZh: 「Two for one coin! Fresh today!」是叫賣聲——孟子在扮演市場小販!
questions.sentenceZh: 「一枚銅錢兩個!今天剛到貨!」孟子大聲喊道。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother put down her cloth right away.
questions.questionEn: Did the mother slowly and calmly finish her weaving before reacting?
questions.explanationZh: 「right away」——立刻放下,一點都不慢!答案是 No,她馬上做出反應。
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽馬上把布放下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 coin = 硬幣
🔑 wave = 揮動
🔑 understand = 明白
🔑 move again = 再搬
再搬家前的關鍵字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She understood that the place was teaching him.
questions.question: What does the mother now fully understand?
options: where you live shapes what you learn
loud voices help children study more
Meng is too young to go to school
market sellers are not good people
optionsZh: 住的地方影響你學什麼
大聲說話讓孩子學更多
questions.explanationZh: 「place was teaching him」——她完全明白了「住的地方影響你學什麼」!
questions.sentenceZh: 她明白了,是這個地方在教他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She knew it was time to move once more.
questions.question: This is now the second move. What has driven both moves?
options: a wish to find a bigger house
worry about what Meng was learning
a need to earn much more money
a plan to be near her own family
questions.explanationZh: 兩次搬家的原因都一樣——「擔心孟子在學的東西」不對她的心意!
questions.sentenceZh: 她知道,是時候再搬一次了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She started packing again with steady, calm hands.
questions.questionEn: Was the mother upset or panicking when she packed?
questions.explanationZh: 「steady, calm hands」——手穩穩的,很平靜!答案是 No,她沒有慌亂。
questions.sentenceZh: 她又開始打包,手又穩又平靜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng waved sticks and called out prices just like the sellers.
questions.question: What is Meng best at doing?
questions.explanationZh: 孟子換哪裡就學哪裡——他最擅長的就是「模仿看到的事」!
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子揮著樹枝,大聲叫賣,就像那些攤販一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: This would be the third house they had lived in.
questions.question: How many places has the family moved to so far?
questions.explanationZh: 「third house」——第三個家!前兩個已搬過,這是第三個。
questions.sentenceZh: 這將是他們住過的第三個家。

questions.sentence: She packed their things.
questions.explanationZh: pack = 打包。故事裡媽媽每次搬家前都先打包——『She packed their things』是最自然的說法！
questions.sentenceZh: 她打包好東西。

questions.sentence: The place was teaching him.
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽的大發現：住的地方默默影響孩子。『The place was teaching him』用過去進行式，表示「那時候一直在發生的事」。
questions.sentenceZh: 這個地方在教他。

questions.sentence: She knew it was time to move.
questions.answer: She knew it was time to move.
accept: She knew it was time to move again.
She knew they had to move again.
She knew they needed to move.
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽每次發現地方不對，就果斷搬家。『She knew it was time to move』是故事的核心句！
questions.sentenceZh: 她知道是時候再搬一次了。

questions.sentence: She started packing again with steady, calm hands.
questions.question: What does the mother's calm manner while packing tell us about her?
options: she is too busy to notice Meng
she is tired and wants to rest
she has a clear plan in her heart
she enjoys the work of packing
optionsZh: 她太忙了，沒注意到孟子
她心裡已經有明確的計畫
questions.explanationZh: 「手又穩又平靜」不是因為喜歡打包，而是她胸有成竹、已決定好下一步。所以答案是「她心裡已經有明確的計畫」。

storyBeat: 搬到學校旁 — 孟子開始讀書

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 third = 第三
🔑 school = 學校
🔑 morning = 早上
🔑 book = 書
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third house stood right next to a small school.
questions.explanationZh: 第三個家就在一所小學校的旁邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They could see the school yard from their own door.
questions.question: How close was the school to their new house?
options: on top of a tall hill
questions.explanationZh: 「right next door + see from door」——站在門口就看得到,當然是「就在他們門邊」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們可以從自己家門口看到學校的院子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every morning Meng heard children reading out loud.
questions.questionEn: Could Meng hear the school from his new home?
questions.explanationZh: 「每天早上聽見小孩朗讀」——從家裡就能聽見,答案當然是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上,孟子都聽見小孩大聲朗讀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He heard a teacher speak about good and kind ways.
questions.explanationZh: 他聽見老師談論善良和正直的方式。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The teacher's words were calm and full of care.
questions.question: What was the teacher teaching?
options: good ways to live and act
questions.explanationZh: 「good and kind ways」——老師在教善良正直的活法,也就是「好的生活和做事方式」!
questions.sentenceZh: 老師說話溫和,充滿關懷。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng began to copy the words from the school next door.
questions.explanationZh: 孟子開始模仿隔壁學校的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sat down with a book and read out loud, too.
questions.question: What did Meng do now that they lived here?
questions.explanationZh: 「sat with book + read out loud」——自己拿書來讀,就是「開始讀書」了!
questions.sentenceZh: 他坐下來拿著書,也大聲朗讀起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother smiled the first wide smile in a long time.
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽露出很久以來第一次的大大笑容。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What does this house teach Meng?
questions.question: What does this house teach?
questions.explanationZh: 聽朗讀、拿書讀——這個環境教他「怎麼學習」!媽媽的選擇對了!
questions.sentenceZh: 這個家在教孟子什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But one afternoon, Meng came home much earlier than the other children...
questions.explanationZh: 但有一天下午,孟子比其他孩子早很多回家……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third house stood right next to a small school.
questions.question: What building was directly beside the third home?
questions.explanationZh: 「next to a small school」——第三個家旁邊就是學校!
questions.sentenceZh: 第三個家就緊靠在一所小學旁邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every morning Meng heard children reading out loud.
questions.questionEn: Did Meng need to go inside the school to hear the lessons?
questions.explanationZh: 在家裡就聽得到——不用進學校。答案是 No,門口就能聽見了!
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上,孟子都聽見小孩大聲朗讀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 read aloud = 朗讀
🔑 teacher = 老師
🔑 kind = 善良
🔑 smile = 笑容
學校篇的關鍵字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He heard a teacher speak about good and kind ways.
questions.question: What did the teacher talk about?
options: how to win at market trading
being good and kind to others
ways to build a strong house
questions.explanationZh: 「good and kind ways」——老師說的是「being good and kind to others」(對人善良正直)!
questions.sentenceZh: 他聽見老師談論善良和正直的方式。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng began to copy the words from the school next door.
questions.question: How is what Meng copies this time different from before?
questions.explanationZh: 搬到學校旁後,孟子改為模仿讀書——「study instead of sad games」!
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子開始模仿隔壁學校傳來的朗讀聲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother smiled the first wide smile in a long time.
questions.questionEn: Has the mother's plan finally worked?
questions.explanationZh: 「first wide smile in a long time」——久違的大笑容!說明媽媽的計畫成功了。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽露出很久以來第一次的大大笑容。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sat down with a book and read out loud, too.
questions.question: What kind of neighbour is best for Meng?
options: 🏫 a school with a good teacher
questions.explanationZh: 學了讀書——最好的鄰居就是「有好老師的學校」!媽媽的選擇對了!
questions.sentenceZh: 他坐下來拿著書,也大聲朗讀起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But one afternoon, Meng came home much earlier than the other children.
questions.question: What does coming home early most likely suggest?
options: he finished all his work first
his teacher sent him home early
he won a prize at the school
optionsZh: 他第一個做完所有功課
questions.explanationZh: 比其他小孩早很多回家——最可能是「他中途停止學習了」,沒有堅持到底!
questions.sentenceZh: 但有一天下午,孟子比其他孩子早很多回家。

storyBeat: 媽媽剪斷織布 — 用行動教持之以恆

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 study = 學習
🔑 loom = 織布機
🔑 weave = 織
🔑 knife = 刀
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day Meng came home early. He did not want to study.
questions.explanationZh: 有一天,孟子提早回家。他不想念書。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had grown tired of his books and his lessons.
questions.question: Why did Meng come home early?
options: he had won a small prize
questions.explanationZh: 「grown tired of books」——讀書讀膩了,所以「他厭倦念書」,才提早回家!
questions.sentenceZh: 他已經厭倦了書本和功課。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother sat at her loom. She did not speak.
questions.questionEn: Was the mother shouting or angry out loud?
questions.explanationZh: 「did not speak」——沒說話、沒大喊——答案是 No,她沒有大聲罵人!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽坐在織布機旁。她一句話都沒說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Without a word, she took her knife.
questions.explanationZh: 一句話也沒說,她拿起刀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She cut the woven cloth in two long pieces.
questions.question: What did the mother do with her knife?
options: ruined her own months of work
optionsZh: 毀掉自己幾個月的工作
questions.explanationZh: 她把布「cut in two」——剪成兩段,就是「毀掉自己幾個月的工作」!那塊布花了她好幾個月呢!
questions.sentenceZh: 她把織好的布剪成兩段。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Like this cloth, your study will be broken if you stop."
questions.explanationZh: 「就像這塊布,如果你停下來,你的學業也會斷掉。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Months of weaving were lost in one quick cut.
questions.question: What was lost when the cloth was cut?
questions.explanationZh: 「months of weaving」——好幾個月織的布,就是「好幾個月的織布」!
questions.sentenceZh: 好幾個月的織布,被一刀剪掉了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng stood very still. He understood his mother's words.
questions.explanationZh: 孟子靜靜站著。他懂了媽媽的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the mother teach her son this time?
questions.question: How did she teach?
questions.explanationZh: 她沒說話,卻拿刀剪布——這是「用行動表演給他看」的教法,比說話更有力!
questions.sentenceZh: 這次媽媽是怎麼教兒子的?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From that day, something changed inside Meng...
questions.explanationZh: 從那天起,孟子心裡有什麼變了……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day Meng came home early. He did not want to study.
questions.question: Why did Meng come home before the others?
options: the school had a surprise holiday
he was tired of his lessons
he missed his lunch at home
questions.explanationZh: 「did not want to study」——不想念書,所以提早回來!
questions.sentenceZh: 有一天孟子提早回家,他不想念書。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His mother sat at her loom. She did not speak.
questions.questionEn: Did the mother yell at Meng when he came home?
questions.explanationZh: 「did not speak」——她一句話都沒說,當然沒有罵人。答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽坐在織布機旁,一句話都沒說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 loom = 織布機
🔑 knife = 刀
🔑 cut = 剪斷
🔑 understood = 懂了
媽媽剪布的關鍵字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Without a word, she took her knife.
questions.question: What does the mother do after staying silent?
questions.explanationZh: 「took her knife」——一句話不說,直接「picks up her knife」(拿起刀)!
questions.sentenceZh: 一句話也沒說,她拿起刀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Like this cloth, your study will be broken if you stop."
questions.question: What does the cut cloth stand for in the mother's lesson?
options: buying a better tool for study
questions.explanationZh: 布剪斷=學業斷掉——剪斷的布代表「中途放棄學習」的後果!
questions.sentenceZh: 「就像這塊布,如果你停下來,你的學業也會斷掉。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng stood very still. He understood his mother's words.
questions.questionEn: Did the mother's action help Meng understand the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: 「stood still + understood」——靜靜站著,懂了!行動式教學成功了。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子靜靜站著,他懂了媽媽的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Months of weaving were lost in one quick cut.
questions.question: How does the cloth show the cost of quitting?
options: ✂️ months of work gone in a moment
🎁 cloth given as a lovely gift
🛒 cloth sold away in the market
optionsZh: 幾個月的工作一瞬間消失
questions.explanationZh: 幾個月的心血一刀剪掉——這就說明「放棄是幾個月的工作瞬間消失」的代價!
questions.sentenceZh: 好幾個月的織布,被一刀剪掉了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From that day, something changed inside Meng.
questions.question: What changed in Meng after the cloth lesson?
options: the way he talked to sellers
his will to keep on learning
the games he liked to play most
the friends he chose every day
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽剪布的那天之後,孟子改變了——改變的是「繼續學習的意志」!
questions.sentenceZh: 從那天起,孟子心裡有什麼變了。

storyBeat: 孟子成為大思想家 — 媽媽的選擇被看見

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 stop = 停
🔑 grow = 長大
🔑 great = 偉大
🔑 thinker = 思想家
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng did not stop again. He read every day.
questions.explanationZh: 孟子沒有再停下。他每天都讀書。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For many years, he sat with his books from sunrise to night.
questions.question: How long did Meng keep on studying?
questions.explanationZh: 「many years from sunrise to night」——從早到晚讀了好多年,就是「連續很多年」!
questions.sentenceZh: 很多年來,他從日出讀書讀到夜晚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He grew up and became a great thinker for all of China.
questions.questionEn: Did Meng become well known when he grew up?
questions.explanationZh: 「great thinker for all China」——全中國都知道他了,當然是出名了!答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 他長大成為整個中國的偉大思想家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell of his mother who moved three times.
questions.explanationZh: 人們至今還在說那個搬了三次家的媽媽。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave up many things so her son could learn well.
questions.question: What did the mother do for her son?
options: gave up much for his learning
questions.explanationZh: 「gave up many things」——放棄了很多——就是「為他學習放棄很多」呀!
questions.sentenceZh: 為了讓兒子好好學習,她放棄了很多事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A child learns most from what stands close to home.
questions.explanationZh: 孩子學最多的,是身邊最近的事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What you see every day shapes who you become.
questions.question: What does this story tell us?
options: your place around you shapes you
questions.explanationZh: 「see every day shapes you」——每天看到的影響你——也就是「你身邊的環境塑造你」!
questions.sentenceZh: 你每天看到的事,塑造了你是什麼樣的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Many parents today still think about where they live for their children.
questions.explanationZh: 今天很多父母還會為了孩子,想著要住在哪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was the bravest thing the mother did?
questions.question: What was her bravest act?
options: 🏠 changing her own home for him
optionsZh: 對他說很多好笑的笑話
questions.explanationZh: 她搬了三次家、剪掉幾個月的心血——這一切都是「為他改變自己的家」,好勇敢的媽媽!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽做過最勇敢的事是什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And so people ask: what would you change, for someone you love?...
questions.explanationZh: 所以人們會問:為了你愛的人,你會改變什麼?……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Meng did not stop again. He read every day.
questions.question: What did Meng do differently after the cloth lesson?
options: stopped reading and went to market
questions.explanationZh: 「did not stop again + read every day」——不再停下,每天讀書!就是「kept studying without stopping」。
questions.sentenceZh: 孟子沒有再停下,他每天都讀書。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He grew up and became a great thinker for all of China.
questions.questionEn: Did Meng become known only in his own small village?
questions.explanationZh: 「for all of China」——整個中國都知道他!不只是小村子。答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 他長大成為整個中國的偉大思想家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 thinker = 思想家
🔑 people say = 人們說
🔑 shape = 塑造
🔑 surroundings = 環境
故事大結局的關鍵字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell of his mother who moved three times.
questions.question: Why do people still remember the mother?
options: she sold goods at the market long
she built three houses by herself
her brave choice made Meng great
optionsZh: 她勇敢的選擇讓孟子偉大
questions.explanationZh: 人們記得她因為「her brave choice made Meng great」——她的選擇成就了孟子!
questions.sentenceZh: 人們至今還在說那個搬了三次家的媽媽。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A child learns most from what stands close to home.
questions.question: What does this sentence tell parents?
options: where you live matters for your child
children only learn inside the classroom
books are the best teachers of all
parents should move as often as possible
optionsZh: 住的地方對孩子很重要
父母應該盡可能常搬家
questions.explanationZh: 「close to home shapes the child」——住的地方影響孩子最深,所以「where you live matters」!
questions.sentenceZh: 孩子學最多的,是離家最近的東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Many parents today still think about where they live for their children.
questions.questionEn: Is the mother's lesson still useful for parents today?
questions.explanationZh: 「many parents today still think about it」——今天的父母還在想這件事!答案是 Yes,這個道理還是有用的。
questions.sentenceZh: 今天很多父母還會為了孩子考慮要住在哪裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mother moved three times so Meng could find the right place to grow.
questions.question: What word best describes this mother?
questions.explanationZh: 搬了三次家——為了孩子這樣堅持,當然是「堅定」的媽媽!
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽搬了三次家,讓孟子找到適合成長的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What you see every day shapes who you become.
questions.question: What is the main message of this whole story?
options: moving is always the best solution
only school lessons make you clever
your daily surroundings form who you are
optionsZh: 搬家永遠是最好的辦法
只有學校課程讓你聰明
你每天所處的環境塑造你
questions.explanationZh: 全故事的核心就是:「your daily surroundings form who you are」(你的日常環境塑造你)!
questions.sentenceZh: 你每天看到的事,塑造了你是什麼樣的人。
